title: Medicare Ground Ambulance Data Collection System (GADCS) Report Appendix
description: This appendix updates the response rates, summary statistics, and econometric analyses described in the previous report with data from all cohorts of the GADCS reported as of May 15, 2025 (including Year 1 through Year 4 cohorts).
text:
Year 1 – Year 4 Cohort Analysis Data Reported Through May 15, 2025
Christine Buttorff, Daniel J. Crespin, Sara E. Heins, Petra W. Rasmussen, Rose Kerber, Jonathan H. Cantor, Hannah James, Jennifer Gildner, Sarah Dalton, Kelsey Marx
ResearchPosted on rand.org Feb 2, 2026Published in: Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services website (2025)
This appendix is an update to the GADCS Report that was posted on December 19, 2024. This appendix updates the response rates, summary statistics, and econometric analyses described in the previous report with data from all cohorts of the GADCS reported as of May 15, 2025 (including Year 1 through Year 4 cohorts).
This publication is part of the RAND external publication series. Many RAND studies are published in peer-reviewed scholarly journals, as chapters in commercial books, or as documents published by other organizations.
